name: amaranth
infodetail: A purple grain cultivated by an ancient civilization.

name: ancient_fruit
infodetail: It's been dormant for eons.

name: apple
infodetail: A crisp fruit used for juice and cider.

name: apricot
infodetail: A tender little fruit with a rock-hard pit.

name: artichoke
infodetail: The bud of a thistle plant. The spiny outer leaves conceal a fleshy, filling interior.

name: banana
infodetail: A sweet, starchy tropical fruit.

name: beet
infodetail: A sweet and earthy root vegetable. As a bonus, the leaves make a great salad.

name: blackberry
infodetail: An early-fall treat.

name: blue_jazz
infodetail: The flower grows in a sphere to invite as many butterflies as possible.

name: blueberry
infodetail: A popular berry reported to have many health benefits. The blue skin has the highest nutrient concentration.

name: bok_choy
infodetail: The leafy greens and fibrous stalks are healthy and delicious.

name: broccoli
infodetail: The flowering head of a broccoli plant. The tiny buds give it a unique texture.

name: cactus_fruit
infodetail: The sweet fruit of the prickly pear cactus.

name: carrot
infodetail: A fast-growing, colorful tuber that makes for a great snack.

name: cauliflower
infodetail: Valuable, but slow-growing. Despite its pale color, the florets are packed with nutrients.

name: chanterelle
infodetail: A tasty mushroom with a fruity smell and slightly peppery flavor.

name: cherry
infodetail: It's popular, and ripens sooner than most other fruits.

name: coffee_bean
infodetail: Plant in spring or summer to grow a coffee plant. Place five beans in a keg to make coffee.

name: common_mushroom
infodetail: Slightly nutty, with good texture.

name: corn
infodetail: One of the most popular grains. The sweet, fresh cobs are a summer favorite.

name: cranberries
infodetail: These tart red berries are a traditional winter food.

name: crocus
infodetail: A flower that can bloom in the winter.

name: crystal_fruit
infodetail: A delicate fruit that pops up from the snow.

name: daffodil
infodetail: A traditional spring flower that makes a nice gift.

name: dandelion
infodetail: Not the prettiest flower, but the leaves make a good salad.

name: eggplant
infodetail: A rich and wholesome relative of the tomato. Delicious fried or stewed.

name: fairy_rose
infodetail: An old folk legend suggests that the sweet smell of this flower attracts fairies.

name: garlic
infodetail: Adds a wonderful zestiness to dishes. High quality garlic can be pretty spicy.

name: grape
infodetail: A sweet cluster of fruit.

name: green_bean
infodetail: A juicy little bean with a cool, crisp snap.

name: hazelnut
infodetail: That's one big hazelnut!

name: hops
infodetail: A bitter, tangy flower used to flavor beer.

name: hot_pepper
infodetail: Fiery hot with a hint of sweetness.

name: kale
infodetail: The waxy leaves are great in soups and stir fries.

name: leek
infodetail: A tasty relative of the onion.

name: mango
infodetail: A big, sweet tropical fruit with a unique flavor.

name: melon
infodetail: A cool, sweet summer treat.

name: morel
infodetail: Sought after for its unique nutty flavor.

name: orange
infodetail: Juicy, tangy, and bursting with sweet summer aroma.

name: parsnip
infodetail: A spring tuber closely related to the carrot. It has an earthy taste and is full of nutrients.

name: peach
infodetail: It's almost fuzzy to the touch.

name: pineapple
infodetail: A sweet and tangy tropical treat.

name: pomegranate
infodetail: Within the fruit are clusters of juicy seeds.

name: poppy
infodetail: In addition to its colorful flower, the Poppy has culinary and medicinal uses.

name: potato
infodetail: A widely cultivated tuber.

name: powdermelon
infodetail: Named for the powdery coating that forms on the surface, this melon is crisp and sweet, with a delicate flavor.

name: pumpkin
infodetail: A fall favorite, grown for its crunchy seeds and delicately flavored flesh. As a bonus, the hollow shell can be carved into a festive decoration.

name: purple_mushroom
infodetail: A rare mushroom found deep in caves.

name: qi_fruit
infodetail: Mr. Qi has challenged you to ship 500 of these strange melons.

name: radish
infodetail: A crisp and refreshing root vegetable with hints of pepper when eaten raw.

name: red_cabbage
infodetail: Often used in salads and coleslaws. The color can range from purple to blue to green-yellow depending on soil conditions.

name: red_mushroom
infodetail: A spotted mushroom sometimes found in caves.

name: rhubarb
infodetail: The stalks are extremely tart, but make a great dessert when sweetened.

name: snow_yam
infodetail: This little yam was hiding beneath the snow.

name: spice_berry
infodetail: It fills the air with a pungent aroma.

name: starfruit
infodetail: An extremely juicy fruit that grows in hot, humid weather. Slightly sweet with a sour undertone.

name: strawberry
infodetail: A sweet, juicy favorite with an appealing red color.

name: summer_spangle
infodetail: A tropical bloom that thrives in the humid summer air. Has a sweet, tangy aroma.

name: summer_squash
infodetail: A curved yellow squash that is harvested while immature, and still tender.

name: sunflower
infodetail: A common misconception is that the flower turns so it's always facing the sun.

name: sweet_gem_berry
infodetail: It's by far the sweetest thing you've ever smelled.

name: sweet_pea
infodetail: A fragrant summer flower.

name: taro_root
infodetail: This starchy root is one of the most ancient crops.

name: tea_leaves
infodetail: The young leaves of the tea plant. Can be brewed into the popular, energizing beverage.

name: tomato
infodetail: Rich and slightly tangy, the Tomato has a wide variety of culinary uses.

name: tulip
infodetail: The most popular spring flower. Has a very faint sweet smell.

name: unmilled_rice
infodetail: Rice in its rawest form. Run this through a mill to increase the value.

name: wheat
infodetail: One of the most widely cultivated grains. Makes a great flour for breads and cakes.

name: wild_horseradish
infodetail: A spicy root found in the spring.

name: wild_plum
infodetail: Tart and juicy with a pungent aroma.

name: winter_root
infodetail: A starchy tuber.

name: yam
infodetail: A starchy tuber with a lot of culinary versatility.
